'''sashaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psalmistry|psalmistry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psalmistry|psalmistry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sashaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshæjæth|sæshæjæth]] || [[word:sæshæjæj|sæshæjæj]] || [[word:sæshæjæsh|sæshæjæsh]] || [[word:sæshæjæ|sæshæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashashajath|sashashajath]] || [[word:sashashajaj|sashashajaj]] || [[word:sashashajash|sashashajash]] || [[word:sashashaja|sashashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashajath|sashajath]] || [[word:sashajaj|sashajaj]] || [[word:sashajash|sashajash]] || [[word:sashaja|sashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashafjath|sashafjath]] || [[word:sashafjaj|sashafjaj]] || [[word:sashafjash|sashafjash]] || [[word:sashafjaf|sashafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashajatha|sashajatha]] || [[word:sashajaja|sashajaja]] || [[word:sashajasha|sashajasha]] || [[word:sashajaka|sashajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashajath|sashajath]] || [[word:sashajaj|sashajaj]] || [[word:sashajash|sashajash]] || [[word:sashaja|sashaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashajathal|sashajathal]] || [[word:sashajajal|sashajajal]] || [[word:sashajashal|sashajashal]] || [[word:sashajakal|sashajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashajathatha|sashajathatha]] || [[word:sashajajaja|sashajajaja]] || [[word:sashajashasha|sashajashasha]] || [[word:sashajaka|sashajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashajathan|sashajathan]] || [[word:sashajajan|sashajajan]] || [[word:sashajashan|sashajashan]] || [[word:sashajakan|sashajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashajathaoro|sashajathaoro]] || [[word:sashajajaoro|sashajajaoro]] || [[word:sashajashaoro|sashajashaoro]] || [[word:sashajakaoro|sashajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
